infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Attendance uses the front camera to take the selfie that verifies it is really you.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Attendance needs access to your photos so you can choose an organization logo.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Attendance uses your location to confirm you are at your workplace when you check in.

plugins.cameraPermission: Attendance uses the front camera to take the selfie that verifies it is really you.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Attendance uses your location to confirm you are at your workplace when you check in.

plugins.photosPermission: Attendance needs access to your photos so you can choose an organization logo.
